summary: There was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for omeprazole on 2022-03-07, with 104 reports received, significantly higher than the expected 58.68.
notable_pattern: Reports included a range of severe adverse events, including acute kidney injury, interstitial lung disease, and suspected suicide, with some patients experiencing multiple events.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any clinical conclusions can be drawn.
